source: PRIMARY: factsheets oficiales (PDF MFS, thornburg.com, Endowus NB) + FT.com per fondo donde no actualizado x weights sleeve T-1
method: Para cada equity holding: regional/sectorial extraído de FT.com fund tearsheet (que toma datos directo del fund manager), ponderado por peso BIG. NO usa Maximus.

verification.mfscv_change_may_vs_mar: Top 10 rotation: salieron Becton/Cenovus/Veolia/Medtronic, entraron Merck/Howden/ABInBev/Symrise/Croda. Industrials +5.7pp, Materials -6.4pp, Utilities +4.3pp (nuevo).
verification.thor_change_may_vs_jan: Income Builder data 4 meses fresca. Sector Financial 22.8 (era 21.6 +1.2pp). Top 10: Orange sigue top, BNP sube a #2.
verification.nbgmt_change_jun_vs_mar: NBGMT fuerte rotation Q2: salio Amdocs (era #1), Expedia, NICE, Uber, Charles_River. Entraron Gen Digital, Chewy, Zeta, ON Semi, Cisco, Shift4, Element, Alibaba. Tema +Tech/Cons.Cyc continua. Regional/sector mantengo Mar-2026 (no disponible publico Jun).

style.title: Distribución por Estilo
style.subtitle: BIG vs BMK (ACWI) — TODO: validar desde Morningstar style box per fund

sectorial.title: Distribución Sectorial
sectorial.subtitle: BIG vs ACWI — Computado PRIMARY (FT.com per fund × weights)
sectorial.method: Sumatoria por fondo: peso_sleeve × sector_pct_FT.com. Datos sectoriales extraídos directo del FT.com fund/ETF tearsheet 2026-05-27.
sectorial.footnote: Sumatoria FT.com 9 fondos × Pershing weights (2026-05-27). Sector "Other" agrupa REITs+otros según mapping FT.com.

primary_sources.CSPX: FT.com tearsheet — Technology 37.61% / Financial 11.14% / Comm. Serv. 11.08% / Cons. Cyc. 9.94% / Health 8.29%
primary_sources.NBGMT: FT.com tearsheet — Technology 38.59% / Cons. Cyc. 14.91% / Industrials 14.85% / Health 12.27% / Comm. Serv. 7.49%
primary_sources.MFSCV: MFS Meridian Contrarian Value factsheet 31-May-2026 (PDF) - Industrials 24.4 / Health 16.0 / Financial 13.4 / Cons.Cyc 13.4 / Cons.Def 12.6 / Materials 8.7 / Utilities 4.3 / Energy 2.3 / Cash 4.9 (sin Tech/Comm.Serv/RE)
primary_sources.THOR: Thornburg Equity Income Builder 31-May-2026 (thornburg.com) - Financial 22.8 / Comm.Serv 16.0 / Tech 10.5 / Health 9.6 / Cash 9.7 (resto Indust/Cons/Energy/Utilities est)
primary_sources.JHGSC: FT.com tearsheet — Industrials 27.75% / Financial 12.78% / Technology 12.02% / Cons. Cyc. 10.97% / Health 8.86%
primary_sources.LGLI: FT.com tearsheet — Utilities 51.29% / Industrials 28.46% / Real estate 13.18% / Comm. Serv. 1.29%
primary_sources.ARGT: FT.com tearsheet — Cons. Cyc. 26.19% / Energy 22.11% / Financial 13.66% / Basic Mat. 13.21% / Industrials 8.31%
primary_sources.4BRZ: FT.com tearsheet — Financial 31.48% / Energy 18.51% / Basic Mat. 14.58% / Utilities 11.87% / Industrials 10.6%
primary_sources.ILF: FT.com tearsheet — Financial 33.75% / Basic Mat. 21.74% / Energy 13.3% / Industrials 9.08% / Cons. Def. 8.76%

regional.title: Distribución Regional
regional.subtitle: BIG vs ACWI — Computado PRIMARY (FT.com per fund × weights)
regional.method: Sumatoria por fondo: peso_sleeve × region_pct_factsheet. Asia Developed asignado a Others (conservador). Japan = MFSCV 3.62% + JHGSC 13.16% × pesos.
regional.footnote: Otros incluye Asia EM (NBGMT 7%), Australasia (JHGSC 5%), Asia Dev (THOR/LGLI), Africa/ME, China, otros. Sanity check vs marzo: NA -5pp (BRK.B salió), Europe +2pp (THOR entró), Japan +0.5pp consistente.

primary_sources.NBGMT: NB factsheet 31-Mar-2026 (Jun-2026 regional no publicado) - US 78.4 / UK 4.8 / Asia EM 7.4 / ME 4.4 / Other 5.0
primary_sources.MFSCV: MFS factsheet 31-May-2026 (PDF MFS) - Eurozone 46.8 (EUR cur) / UK 22.2 / US 16.5 / Canada 3.9 / Japan 3.4 / Cash 7.2
primary_sources.THOR: Thornburg Equity Income Builder 31-May-2026 (thornburg.com) - US 24.9 / France 14.4 / Germany 8.7 / Netherlands 7.1 / UK 7.8 / Japan~5 / Asia Dev/Other ~25
primary_sources.JHGSC: Janus Henderson 31-Mar-2026 (sin cambio) - US 60.9 / Japan 13.2 / Eurozone 7.4 / Australasia 4.6 / UK 4.4 / Other 9.5
primary_sources.LGLI: L&G 31-Mar-2026 (sin cambio) - Eurozone 39.4 / US 23.7 / UK 20.2 / Canada 4.3 / Asia Dev 3.6 / Other 8.8
primary_sources.ILF: iShares LatAm 40 - Brazil ~58 / Mexico ~22 / Chile ~7 / others 13
